REQUIREMENT:
SECTION: 1. Purpose
Create a Vendor Master Report program that displays vendor information with filtering capabilities and ALV output for procurement analysis.

SECTION: 2. Scope
ABAP Report program with selection screen, data retrieval from LFA1/LFB1 tables, and ALV grid display. Must support filtering by vendor number range, company code, and account group.

SECTION: 3. Structure
Structure: ZST_VENDOR_REPORT
Fields:
- LIFNR (LIFNR) - Vendor Number
- NAME1 (NAME1_GP) - Vendor Name
- SORTL (SORTL) - Sort Field
- STRAS (STRAS) - Street Address
- ORT01 (ORT01) - City
- PSTLZ (PSTLZ) - Postal Code
- LAND1 (LAND1) - Country
- BUKRS (BUKRS) - Company Code
- AKONT (AKONT) - Reconciliation Account
- ZTERM (DZTERM) - Payment Terms
- KTOKK (KTOKK) - Account Group

SECTION: 4. Table
N/A

SECTION: 5. Value Help
Value Help CDS View: ZI_VENDOR_VH
Provide F4 help for vendor selection with LIFNR and NAME1 fields.
Base table: LFA1
Key field: LIFNR
Text field: NAME1

SECTION: 6. CDS
CDS View Entity: ZI_VENDOR_MASTER
Base tables: LFA1, LFB1
Association: LFA1-LIFNR = LFB1-LIFNR
Fields to expose:
- Vendor Number (LIFNR)
- Vendor Name (NAME1)
- City (ORT01)
- Country (LAND1)
- Company Code (BUKRS)
- Reconciliation Account (AKONT)
- Payment Terms (ZTERM)

SECTION: 7. Function Module
N/A

SECTION: 8. Global Class
N/A

SECTION: 9. Report Program
Report: ZREP_VENDOR_MASTER
Selection Screen:
- s_lifnr: SELECT-OPTIONS for vendor number (LIFNR)
- s_bukrs: SELECT-OPTIONS for company code (BUKRS)
- s_ktokk: SELECT-OPTIONS for account group (KTOKK)

Logic:
1. Validate selection screen inputs
2. Select data from CDS view ZI_VENDOR_MASTER with selection criteria
3. Build internal table with structure ZST_VENDOR_REPORT
4. Display results using CL_SALV_TABLE ALV
5. Add toolbar buttons for export to Excel
6. Enable column sorting and filtering
